default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review 2025 SEO performance and align on the 2026 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**2025 Performance:** A refresh-heavy strategy (80 articles refreshed vs. 16 new) widened the competitive gap, especially in LLM visibility (top recommendation for 76% of queries).](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [**2026 Strategic Shift:** The focus moves from general traffic to business-unit (BU) specific goals. This requires tailored plays for mature markets (e.g., BLC) vs. immature ones (e.g., DMI) and integrated SEO/SEM reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Top Priority:** Counter MetricStream's Q4 2025 surge by re-establishing Diligent's top-3 GRC positioning and expanding presence for key products like Boards, AI Governance, and DMI Vault.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [**Leadership Mandate:** Abi requested a draft 2026 plan by early next week to align SEO with broader marketing goals, including supporting paid media's efficiency targets (6.5x → 9-12x ROAS).](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)

## Topics

### 2025 Performance & Strategic Rationale

  - [**Strategy:** Prioritized refreshing 80 existing articles over creating 16 new ones.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach delivered faster, incremental lifts and was more effective for improving LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [**Results:**](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [**Search Rankings:** Top-3 positions increased from 4,099 → 6,800.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**LLM Visibility:** Top recommendation for 76% of tracked queries (+12% increase).](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Competitive Gap:** Widened against OnBoard but narrowed against MetricStream in Q4 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [**Organic Mix Goal:** The 50% organic mix goal was not met (current: 32-33%), a direct result of the refresh-heavy strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)

### 2026 Strategic Shift: BU-Centric Approach

  - [**Problem:** General SEO metrics (e.g., traffic) don't align with Diligent's BU-level business goals.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift to a BU-centric strategy with tailored plays for different market maturities:](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Mature Markets (e.g., BLC):** Focus on capturing existing demand and winning competitive SERP gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [**Immature Markets (e.g., DMI):** Build a "moat" via PR/AR partnerships to capture future search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [**Reporting:** Realign all reporting to BU performance, integrating SEO with SEM to show a blended view of competitive distance.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Zero-Click Experience:** A key 2026 bet is capturing the zero-click experience (snippets, deals) to control the narrative for the 95% of the audience not yet in-market.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)

### Q1 2026 Priorities

  - [**Re-establish Top-3 GRC Positioning:** Counter MetricStream's Q4 2025 surge.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [**Expand Presence:** Focus on Boards, AI Governance, and DMI Vault.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [**Maintain Presence:** Protect rankings for DRM and Compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility:** Use new internal tooling to find fresh topics and refresh opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

### Team Transition

  - [**Vivek Shankar (GrowthX):** Departing at month-end.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [**Carrie (GrowthX):** Taking over the Diligent account.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [**Andi Bailey (GrowthX):** Customer Operations Lead, joined to meet the team.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
      - [Deliver a non-branded performance report to Abi.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [Categorize DMI Vault materials and send to Kezia by Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
      - [Send Abi a note detailing requirements for the 2026 plan.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
      - [Draft the 2026 SEO plan for Abi's review by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [**Kezia:**](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [Lead internal discovery sessions for DMI next week.](https://fathom.video/share/251sa2PFsxZdaiepHodynKd-uMXKqR7b?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
